creator: inbox@alleghenycomputer.com
text:
Hello,

I am receiving the following area on multiple computers trying to build the latest version of Domination running FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE:

===>   domination-1.2.4_1 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/unzip - found
===>  Patching for domination-1.2.4_1
===>   Converting DOS text files to UNIX text files
===>  Configuring for domination-1.2.4_1
** Missing /usr/ports/games/domination/files/pkg-message.in for domination-1.2.4_1.
*** Error code 1

I tried completely uninstaling and building again with the same results.

Thoughts, Suggestions?
